{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011721A6AABA601D95374F7964"}"},"total":815},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7423028121005425470","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我个人认为目前在红柿子看过的最好看的。超好看，因为简介说已经完结了，我去看了未删减版的看完了，很好看，人物性格好，剧情很流畅[害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728311252,"group_id":"7404799002014665753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N82evV/nkMj7G2x32PI9B3weaMuv9t1M/1b7gXBfz2rz","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/573e2050dd21495db97410935b370b5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794066&x-signature=bynSVK%2FA5HNqy6qNUfl%2FZWrJfl8%3D","user_id":"1009778930223204","user_name":"用户snay"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1009778930223204","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_info":{"abstract":"异世大陆，1V1，男主一位是强悍勇猛的战士，一位是能力无双的天才，两人携手改变世界。

这是尼子2022年的作品，已完结，原名《蒂玛塔的夏天》。因为上传时文章标题出错，就加了一个“异世之”。

尼子的所有作品皆为原创，也只会写原创的故事！

【本文文案：】
穆仲夏怎么也不会想到，难得搭乘一次穿越航班，他却要被送往蛮族了！这还不是最糟糕的，最糟糕的是，他要被送去的地方完全就是异世版宁古塔。冬天秒秒钟能把人冻死的地方！

在这个世界，术法师和机械师是金字塔顶尖的人物，他一个农学院的老师被送到这里来要怎么活！

泰瑟尔，亚罕冻原帝玛塔人第三部落的最强者，原本是临时起意的决定，却没想到他带回部落的伊甸人不仅改变了帝玛塔人的命运，甚至改变了整个罗格里格大陆的命运。

（喜欢的亲们请给尼子点个赞，不喜欢的亲们也请不要恶语相向，只需退出。感谢一路以来支持的你们！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7a32d7dcf7907079fa03720d78fa86f6","author":"neleta","author_id":"","book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_name":"异世之帝玛塔的夏天","book_short_name":"冰原仲夏夜","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7812人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7404799006452220441","read_count":"7812","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1647042"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"366","tags":"双男主,穿越,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe8c2507e860cd90260d65dd1bf8dadfd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383841&x-signature=ZNT1iuCG5oU0NRQtbrrCIgk1KeM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"594163744113597","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011721A6AABA601D95374F7964"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":20308},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596386281266168600","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本我真的强推，太好看了，让我不知道该用什么言语去形容。整本下来我一章没跳，我可以用我下半辈子不看小说做担保，真的非常好看。世界观大，人物刻画丰满，剧情不作也不啰嗦，该细细该略略，我看的时候，脑子里可以一直模拟出书中大概的情景，但无法想象出书中那些场景有多宏大多壮观。这是我看了几年小说来唯一一本看完的破80万字的小说，也是唯一一本让我从没想过弃文的书，更是唯一一本让我激动到写长评（相对我自己写过的书评）的书。这本书最大的特点就是，它不千篇一律的基本算流水线生产的现在的小说，这是一本“创新”的书，最大的特点就是新，我从没阅读过这么让我有想看欲望的书。我个人认为这本书完全可以出版，但我又不想它出版，因为会大修也会改变很多东西。我始终认为，我只是一个偷窥者，偷窥着他们在另一个世界的生活，我只希望他们在我看不见的地方好好地幸福地生活。感谢世界上最伟大的作者大人，让我能够知道在另一个世界的他们。[送心]
我在这里只想对另一个世界的他们所有人送上祝福：希望你们在我们没有看见的地方也好好地幸福。[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768674499,"group_id":"7404799002014665753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"天天躺在床上看小说，却始终幻想着瘦十斤的懒癌晚期患者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzooiR3k+Xq4bCF9f8/s9pE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8c336d6e66854c69b6f02d12e801116c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794794&x-signature=b3VMAVODSoJEJSuKW1a0Ij7qphU%3D","user_id":"160954084492556","user_name":"二十三四"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"160954084492556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_info":{"abstract":"异世大陆，1V1，男主一位是强悍勇猛的战士，一位是能力无双的天才，两人携手改变世界。

这是尼子2022年的作品，已完结，原名《蒂玛塔的夏天》。因为上传时文章标题出错，就加了一个“异世之”。

尼子的所有作品皆为原创，也只会写原创的故事！

【本文文案：】
穆仲夏怎么也不会想到，难得搭乘一次穿越航班，他却要被送往蛮族了！这还不是最糟糕的，最糟糕的是，他要被送去的地方完全就是异世版宁古塔。冬天秒秒钟能把人冻死的地方！

在这个世界，术法师和机械师是金字塔顶尖的人物，他一个农学院的老师被送到这里来要怎么活！

泰瑟尔，亚罕冻原帝玛塔人第三部落的最强者，原本是临时起意的决定，却没想到他带回部落的伊甸人不仅改变了帝玛塔人的命运，甚至改变了整个罗格里格大陆的命运。

（喜欢的亲们请给尼子点个赞，不喜欢的亲们也请不要恶语相向，只需退出。感谢一路以来支持的你们！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7a32d7dcf7907079fa03720d78fa86f6","author":"neleta","author_id":"","book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_name":"异世之帝玛塔的夏天","book_short_name":"冰原仲夏夜","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7812人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7404799006452220441","read_count":"7812","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1647042"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"366","tags":"双男主,穿越,现代,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oe8c2507e860cd90260d65dd1bf8dadfd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383841&x-signature=ZNT1iuCG5oU0NRQtbrrCIgk1KeM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"594163744113597","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"441"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323011721A6AABA601D95374F7964"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读28小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":7177,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":100802,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":3663},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768674861,"author_reply_time":1768674856,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7430801040318890777","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到后面了，番茄还没发，不妨碍我来留言
看到了升阶战，有感而发。优秀的群像是共同进步，携手同行，你可以比我更优秀，哪怕你不是主角。
现在争番太严重了，小说里也一样，哪怕男女主角都要争一争，能接受所谓双强就很不错了，大多数是不能接受“各自为王”的，更不喜欢男主更强。
“夏天”里，配角们熠熠生辉，他们可以先主角一步成为冕下，成为里程碑式的决定性人物，成为历史里举足轻重的一个名字。就像泰大，以残缺之身再次成为勇者，迎娶不亚于男主“弟媳”优秀程度的老婆，彼此治愈，成就更好的人生。
我喜欢这样“完整”的故事，并不是只有一个主角成功，一对cp的美满，这是璀璨星空下绚烂的烟花秀，每一朵都足够的耀眼，才是一个完美的夜晚。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730121477,"group_id":"7404799002014665753","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1385811022457390"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"281"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":53791,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7430674924322390809","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了一大半了，来评论一下。作者应该是偏正统老派一些风格的写手，从剧情，世界观，节奏可以看出来，并不是番茄偏爱又多见的写法，或应该说并不是当下受欢迎的写法，现在讲究“情感洁癖”，节奏要快，剧情要炸，世界观过得去就行、实在有漏洞，一句架空就可以解释完了。
这篇文有着非常严谨的世界观，几乎没有什么漏洞，有些衔接不好的应该和割肉有关。cp就没有强求洁的，可以说出场的人就没有介意这事的，我很喜欢，现在网文沉迷“初恋”不可自拔，然而我觉得真正的美好是，不论何时何地，你都可能遇到新的故事，你曾驻足过，不代表再次出发是错的，你一败涂地，甚至残缺了一无所有了，你仍然很美，你可以选择开花，可以选择当一棵树，你也可以做一缕风，只要你愿意。
我从来都是旗帜鲜明的不喜双洁文化的，当然这不是我喜欢本文的核心原因。这本书宁可慢热也要逻辑完整，热血与爽点都恰到好处，有一种娓娓而来的美感。
里面的主角不算完美，受圣母，扶贫，用异世界文明社会铸就的价值观去面对宁古塔艰难求存的原始人，塔妹是我很不喜欢的类型，我最烦任性又讲不通的人，双泰也有自己的性格缺陷，但他们无比和谐的在作者构建的世界里存在着，让我觉得，啊，好烦啊，但他们好真实，他们就应该是这样的。
有的书让人会想要代入，有的书则让人“观看那段历史”，这本书就是后者，所以我才看到一半特地来回复，不要因为设定不合意就差评，故事不对胃口很正常，但故事本身写的不错的，多一些优秀的作者，才能看到更多不一样的世界。
希望能看到作者更多瑰丽绚烂的梦境，加油。","text_exts":[{"e":429,"s":426,"text":"原始人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774199841374F7964%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227430674924322390809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227404799002014665753%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%9F%E5%A7%8B%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730093497,"group_id":"7404799002014665753","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢笨蛋美人，但厌蠢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0LqLCGi9lkp6QEiQ9PhqAWwKYL1UTYlsm4Y0U1GkGs2","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c25ad2c5de734d0fab508576bdd2fb7e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791913&x-signature=C7Rhv88UoxBsTy%2FY5Ur8oKYpjQM%3D","user_id":"1385811022457390","user_name":"西窗已冷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1385811022457390","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1685264278,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404799002014665753","book_info":{"abstract":"异世大陆，1V1，男主一位是强悍勇猛的战士，一位是能力无双的天才，两人携手改变世界。

在这个世界，术法师和机械师是金字塔顶尖的人物，他一个农学院的老师被送到这里来要怎么活！

泰瑟尔，亚罕冻原帝玛塔人第三部落的最强者，原本是临时起意的决定，却没想到他带回部落的伊甸人不仅改变了帝玛塔人的命运，甚至改变了整个罗格里格大陆的命运。
